---
name: EPUB Compatibility
about: Book fails to parse, chapters are missing/out of order, or text is garbled
title: ''
labels: epub
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the problem
What went wrong when processing the EPUB?

- [ ] Tool exits with an error during parsing
- [ ] Chapters are missing
- [ ] Chapters are in the wrong order
- [ ] Text content is garbled or contains raw HTML/markup
- [ ] Other: ___

## Command used
```
speak-epub [your flags here] book.epub
```

## Error output (if any)
```
paste here
```

## EPUB details
- Title / source (or note if private):
- EPUB version (if known): <!-- EPUB 2 or EPUB 3 -->
- Where it was obtained: <!-- e.g. Project Gutenberg, Calibre export, publisher download -->
- Number of items in the spine (if known):

## Can you share the file?
A minimal reproducible EPUB (or a public download link) is the fastest way to fix compatibility bugs. If the book is private, describe anything unusual about its structure.

## Environment
- OS:
- Python version:
- speak-epub version:
- ebooklib version: <!-- pip show ebooklib -->
